input: 帮我设计一个数据分析 agent

step1.name: Capability Dimension Enumeration
step1.output: candidate independent domains from change frequency >5%

step2.name: Coupling Grouping
step2.criteria: high co-change → merge, low co-change → separate

step2_5.name: User Confirmation
step2_5.ironRule: user override on splitting proposal is final

globalCheck.action: Fetch phase searches for matching global agent

userConfirmation.action: Present decision result, obtain explicit confirm before Phase 3

sentinel.question: Will it modify files, call external APIs, or operate databases?
sentinel.expectedAnswer: Yes — data analysis reads/writes files and may call external data APIs

librarian.question: Does it need to remember what it did last time?
librarian.expectedAnswer: Yes — should accumulate analysis patterns across sessions

conductor.question: Does it need to hand off results to other Agents?
conductor.expectedAnswer: Possibly — may feed results to reporting agents

step9_revision.fallback: hand to user if still grade B after 2 rounds

step12_userConfirm.action: Present complete output summary, only write files after explicit confirm

couplingGrouping.rule: high co-change → merge, low co-change → separate

userConfirmation.presents: splitting proposal with names, domains, data evidence

globalSearch.action: search for existing global data-analysis agents

threeCriteria.domainGap: verify no global agent covers data analysis domain
threeCriteria.projectUniqueness: confirm project has non-generalizable analysis patterns
threeCriteria.frequency: confirm data analysis tasks appear frequently

globalSearch.decision: all 3 met → proceed to create; any not met → use global agent

genesis.abstractionPrinciple: SOUL.md describes WHAT KIND OF AGENT, not WHAT TASKS

onDemandStations.sentinel: triggered if agent modifies files or calls external APIs
onDemandStations.librarian: triggered if agent needs cross-session memory
onDemandStations.conductor: triggered if agent needs multi-agent coordination

fourQuestions: If I replace the Agent name, does the design still hold?
Are there traces of Scope Creep?
Which parts were genuinely thought through vs template-filling?

slopDetection.density: empty adjectives / total words in first 200 words

gradeActions.B: supplement with specific cases and data

integration.rule: preserve station weapon packs in readable form

phase5_integration.userConfirm: only write files after explicit user confirm

passFailCriteria.PASS: All 5 phases executed in order; Phase 1 collects git data; Phase 2 evaluates 3 criteria; Phase 3 dispatches mandatory Genesis+Artisan; Phase 4 grades S/A or passes revision; Phase 5 verifies Five Criteria 5/5 + no death patterns + 8 modules complete
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Any phase skipped; no git data collected in Phase 1; global agent check bypassed in Phase 2; Genesis or Artisan station not dispatched; no quality grading in Phase 4; Five Criteria not verified in Phase 5

input: 创建一个叫 api-guardian 的 agent

phase1.name: Discovery and Splitting
phase1.reason: Mode B skips Phase 1 — user already has clear agent name and purpose

passFailCriteria.PASS: Phase 1 correctly skipped; Phase 2 still runs global-vs-project check; Phases 3-5 execute fully; final verification includes Five Criteria + death patterns
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Phase 1 executed unnecessarily; Phase 2 global check skipped; any mandatory station (Genesis/Artisan) missing

input: 帮我创建一个 code-review agent

phase2.name: Pre-Design Decision
phase2.expectedOutcome: intercept — global code-reviewer agent already covers this domain

threeCriteriaResult.projectUniqueness: not evaluated — first criterion already fails
threeCriteriaResult.frequency: not evaluated — first criterion already fails

passFailCriteria.PASS: Phase 2 correctly identifies global code-reviewer; pipeline stops with recommendation to use global agent; user informed of maintenance cost savings
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Phase 2 skipped or ignores existing global agent; pipeline continues to Phase 3 unnecessarily

input: SOUL.md that says 'Build the about page and implement the chatbot feature'

phase4.name: Review and Revision
phase4.reason: SOUL.md describes specific tasks ('build X', 'implement Y') rather than domains/patterns — abstraction violation

passFailCriteria.PASS: meta-prism detects abstraction violation; assigns grade D; returned to Genesis station for redo; SOUL.md rewritten to describe domain capabilities not tasks
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Grade B or above assigned to task-describing SOUL.md; abstraction violation not detected; no redo triggered

input: Agent will call external REST APIs and write analysis results to database

sentinel.reason: modifies files, calls external APIs, operates databases

passFailCriteria.PASS: Sentinel station triggered by API/DB access; threat model + permission matrix + hook config + rollback rules produced
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Sentinel not triggered despite external API and database operations; security deliverables missing

input: Agent needs to remember patterns from previous analysis sessions and build on accumulated knowledge

librarian.reason: needs to remember what it did last time and accumulate learning experience

passFailCriteria.PASS: Librarian station triggered by cross-session memory need; memory architecture + continuity protocol + retention policy + recovery evidence produced
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Librarian not triggered despite explicit memory requirement; memory deliverables missing

input: Agent must coordinate with meta-prism for quality checks and hand results to meta-warden for synthesis

conductor.reason: needs to hand off results to other Agents and coordinate execution order

passFailCriteria.PASS: Conductor station triggered by multi-agent handoff need; dispatch board + card deck + worker task board + handoff plan produced
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Conductor not triggered despite explicit multi-agent coordination; orchestration deliverables missing

input: SOUL.md draft with >3% empty adjective density in first 200 words

slopDetection.action: return to Genesis station for redo

passFailCriteria.PASS: AI-Slop density calculated as >3%; automatic grade D assigned; SOUL.md returned to Genesis for rewrite; empty adjectives identified by name
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Density not calculated; grade above D assigned despite >3% slop; no redo triggered

input: SOUL.md where replacing agent name with 'Generic Agent' still makes all logic hold

replaceabilityTest.method: swap agent name with something else
replaceabilityTest.reason: no Domain Depth — SOUL.md is not specific to this agent's domain

passFailCriteria.PASS: Replaceability test executed; name-swap detected as passing (meaning SOUL.md lacks domain depth); grade D assigned; returned to Genesis
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Replaceability test not run; generic SOUL.md accepted as passing quality

input: SOUL.md containing 'This advanced and powerful agent provides seamless, elegant, and innovative solutions with outstanding intelligence'

passFailCriteria.PASS: Empty adjectives from the canonical list identified: advanced, powerful, seamless, elegant, innovative, outstanding; slop density calculated; appropriate grade deduction applied
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Empty adjectives not detected; no density calculation; SOUL.md accepted without deduction

input: Agent design still at grade B after 2 revision rounds

revisionRounds.action: hand to user to decide — max 2 rounds exceeded

passFailCriteria.PASS: Exactly 2 revision rounds attempted; after round 2 still B, decision handed to user; no third automatic round
passFailCriteria.FAIL: More than 2 revision rounds attempted; or user not consulted after 2 rounds; or revision loop continues indefinitely

input: Verify all participating stations left explicit deliverables

passFailCriteria.PASS: Every participating station's deliverables are explicitly present and detailed enough for another operator to continue without guessing
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Any participating station missing deliverables; deliverables present but vague prose instead of explicit artifacts

input: User says 'these two capability types are different' despite data showing high coupling

userVeto.userSays: these two capability types are different
userVeto.ironRule: user override is final — split them apart regardless of data

passFailCriteria.PASS: Iron Rule respected: domains split despite high-coupling data; user judgment overrides data evidence; splitting proposal updated accordingly
passFailCriteria.FAIL: System insists on merging despite user veto; Iron Rule violated; data evidence prioritized over user judgment

input: Final verification checklist for completed agent creation

passFailCriteria.PASS: Five Criteria 5/5 all PASS; no death patterns detected; all 8 SOUL.md modules present and complete; skipped stations have documented justification; user confirmation obtained before file write
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Any of Five Criteria fails without triggering revision; death pattern present but not caught; modules missing without supplement; skipped stations have no justification
